ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group (e.g., American Indian, Asian, Black, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnic group */,
  "short_code" TEXT /* Short code for the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report version */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES report_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the demographic record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the demographic record */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the report version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the versioned report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
